series_metadata.series_title: C U Guaranty Corporation Correspondence of a Regulatory Significance.
series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains written communication with regulatory significance from a credit union supervisory authority of another state to the credit union share guaranty corporation as defined by Ohio Administrative Code Section 1301:9-3-07.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files until next examination, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
